heading: Availability of class II gaming activity fees to carry out duties of Commission
label: 2717a Availability of class II gaming activity fees to carry out duties of Commission
text: In fiscal year 1990 and thereafter, fees collected pursuant to and as limited by shall be available to carry out the duties of the Commission, to remain available until expended.section 2717 of this title
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Department of the Interior and Related Agencies Appropriations Act, 1990, and not as part of the Indian Gaming Regulatory Act which comprises this chapter.
